category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an open controller for MiniPRO TL866xx chip programmers.
source_facts.homepage and repo are the official GitLab project for minipro.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab repository is named minipro.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitLab repository, and its README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://gitlab.com/DavidGriffith/minipro, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supplies MiniPRO TL866xx chip programmer context.
source_facts.executables lists minipro as a CLI executable.
